title: Continue a chapter by making a branching choice
description: This verifies that a reader can submit a branching choice and proceed to the next chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the current story entry from the home feed
Click the resume reading entry
Select one of the available branching choices
Verify the next chapter is displayed
Verify the previous choice is reflected in the reader state

title: Continue a branching story from a chapter and reach the next chapter
description: A returning reader can open a chapter, make a branching choice, and arrive at the next chapter in the reading loop.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the current story from the home feed
Continue reading from the story detail page
Select a branching choice in the chapter
Verify the next chapter is displayed
Verify branching choices are available

title: Resume a story from the chapter reader and advance the narrative
description: This verifies a returning reader can open a story, resume the current chapter, make a branching choice, and continue to the next chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /beranda
Open the current story from the home feed
Continue reading from the story detail page
Select one of the available branching choices
Verify the next chapter is displayed
Verify the story continues after the choice is accepted

title: Read a chapter and continue through a branching choice
description: An authenticated reader can open a chapter, make a branching choice, and continue to the next chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a story detail page
Resume reading a chapter
Select a branching choice
Verify the next chapter is displayed
Verify the chosen path is reflected in the reading flow

title: Start the onboarding journey from the landing page
description: This verifies that a new reader can begin onboarding from the landing experience and reach the onboarding flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call to continue into onboarding
Verify the onboarding flow is displayed
Verify the user can start answering onboarding questions

title: Complete onboarding and enter the story selection experience
description: A new reader can finish onboarding at the landing flow, choose a recommended story, and reach the authenticated home experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue into the onboarding flow
Complete the onboarding selections
Choose a recommended story
Proceed into the reading experience
Verify the authenticated home experience is displayed
Verify a selected story is shown

title: Complete onboarding and enter the recommended story experience
description: This verifies that a new reader can finish onboarding, choose a recommended story, and arrive at the authenticated home experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call to continue into onboarding
Answer the onboarding questions with a valid set of responses
Select one of the recommended stories
Continue into the story experience
Verify the home experience is displayed
Verify a current story entry is available

title: Complete onboarding and enter the home experience
description: A new reader can finish the quiz, choose a recommended story, and arrive in the authenticated home experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Select an option for the first quiz question
Continue to the next quiz step
Select a recommended story to begin
Verify the home experience is displayed

title: Resume reading from the home feed
description: A returning reader can log in, open the home feed, and resume their current story from the story detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the home feed
Open the current story detail
Verify the story detail page is displayed
Verify a resume or continue reading entry is available

title: Handle a chapter that is still loading or unavailable
description: An authenticated reader can open a chapter and see a pending or unavailable placeholder when the chapter is not yet ready.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a story detail page
Resume reading a chapter that is not ready
Verify a pending or unavailable chapter placeholder is displayed

title: Log in to reach the home feed
description: This verifies that a returning reader can sign in with email and password and land in the authenticated home experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated home experience is displayed
Verify a current story entry is available

title: Log in and open the current story from the home feed
description: A returning reader can sign in, reach the home feed, open the current story, and resume reading.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the current story from the home feed
Verify a story detail page is displayed
Verify a continue reading entry point is visible

title: Handle a pending choice while reading a chapter
description: This verifies a reader can make a branching choice, see that the next chapter is still being prepared, and then proceed when it becomes available.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /baca/1
Read the chapter content
Select a branching choice
Verify a waiting state for the next chapter is displayed
Wait for the next chapter to become available
Verify the story can continue after the waiting state

title: Show the reader when a chapter is not available
description: This verifies that the chapter reader shows a placeholder when the requested chapter cannot be rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the current story entry from the home feed
Click the resume reading entry
Verify a chapter-unavailable placeholder is displayed
Verify no branching choices are available

title: See the waiting placeholder for an unavailable chapter
description: This verifies a reader sees a placeholder when the next chapter is not yet available.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /baca/1
Verify a chapter unavailable placeholder is displayed
Verify the reader can wait for the chapter to be prepared

title: Resume reading from a story detail page
description: This verifies that a reader can open a story detail page and continue into the current chapter reader.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the current story entry from the home feed
Click the resume reading entry
Verify the chapter reader is displayed
Verify a chapter and branching choices are available

title: Retry a pending choice and continue the story
description: This verifies a reader can retry the same choice after an initial submission does not complete and still advance once accepted.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /baca/1
Select a branching choice
Retry the same choice from the chapter view
Verify the story continues after the choice is accepted
Verify the next chapter is displayed

title: Open a story from the home feed and continue into reading
description: A reader can browse available stories in the home feed, open one, and continue into the chapter view.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an available story from the home feed
Continue reading from the story detail page
Verify the reader view is displayed

title: Open a story detail and continue reading
description: This verifies a reader can review a story detail page and continue into the current chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /beranda
Open a story from the home feed
Verify the story cover and synopsis are displayed
Continue reading from the story detail page
Verify the chapter reader is displayed

title: Browse ongoing and completed stories in the library
description: A reader can open their library, switch between ongoing stories and completed endings, and open a finished story's ending screen.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the library
Switch to a completed story
Open the finished story ending
Verify the ending screen is displayed
Verify completed story content is visible

title: Review ongoing and completed stories in the library
description: This verifies that a reader can browse the library and distinguish ongoing stories from completed endings.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the library navigation entry
Verify the library page is displayed

title: Change an onboarding answer before starting a story
description: A reader can go back, change a quiz answer, and still complete onboarding with a story selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Select an option for the first quiz question
Continue to the next quiz step
Go back to the previous question
Select a different answer
Continue through the quiz
Select a recommended story to begin
Verify the home experience is displayed

title: Resume a story from my collection
description: A logged-in reader can open an ongoing story from their collection and continue reading from the story detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the library page
Open an ongoing story from the collection

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the library navigation entry
Click a completed story entry

title: Return from story detail to the home experience
description: This verifies a reader can open a story detail page and return to the home experience without losing navigation context.

steps.description: Navigate to /beranda
Open a story from the home feed
Return to the home experience from the story detail page
Verify the home experience is displayed
Verify the story feed remains available

title: Switch from an ongoing story to a completed ending in my collection

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the brainstorm wizard
Request generated premises
Select a premise
Advance through the wizard stages
Lock the story bible to canon
Verify the story bible review is displayed
Verify the canon lock state is visible

Submit the login form

title: Review consistency dashboard metrics and alerts
description: This verifies that an authorized ops user can open the consistency dashboard and inspect metrics, chart data, stale threads, and alert status.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin consistency navigation entry
Verify consistency metric cards are displayed

description: An authorized user can regenerate premise suggestions, choose a different premise, go back to an earlier stage, and update the story bible before locking it.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the brainstorm wizard
Request generated premises
Regenerate the premise suggestions
Select a different premise
Go back to the previous wizard stage
Update the story bible details
Verify the updated story bible content is displayed
Verify the wizard can still be locked to canon

title: Review admin consistency metrics and alerts
description: This verifies an authorized ops user can open the consistency dashboard and review its metrics and alerts.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Submit the login form

description: This verifies that a returning reader sees validation feedback when signing in with incorrect credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible
Verify the authenticated home experience is not displayed

description: This verifies that account creation is blocked when the password confirmation does not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/sign-up
Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with a different password
Submit the account creation form
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the sign-up success confirmation is not displayed

title: Open the sign-up page from login
description: This verifies that a visitor can navigate from login to the account creation page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Click the link to create a new account
